rationale: Ukraine continues to reclaim territory and intensify strikes on Russian logistics — this is a continuation of last cycle's positive qualitative shift; baseline sustained but no new escalation to push score higher.

top_events.title: Ukraine reclaims territory, doubles attacks on Russian logistics
top_events.summary: Ukrainian forces continue territorial gains and intensified logistics strikes against Russia — a continuation of the positive battlefield trend directly affecting the lives and safety of Ukrainian residents.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Iran-US deal stalemate keeps US diplomatic attention partially diverted; no concrete change to Western military aid flows to Ukraine this cycle.

top_events.title: France-Germany FCAS jet plans collapse: European defense autonomy questioned
top_events.summary: The collapse of the Franco-German fighter program signals continued EU defense fragmentation, which has indirect implications for long-term European military support to Ukraine.
